_comment: FAQ content for Pitfal Solutions. Edit this file and redeploy to update FAQ on the website. Answers support markdown formatting.

questions.question: How do I book a session?
questions.answer: Fill out the inquiry form on the [Contact](/contact) page with your preferred session type and date. You'll hear back within 24 hours to discuss details and availability.

questions.question: What is your cancellation policy?
questions.answer: Plans change — that's understood. Please give at least 48 hours notice for cancellations or rescheduling. Last-minute cancellations may forfeit the deposit.

questions.question: What should I wear to my session?
questions.answer: Be comfortable and be yourself! Solid colors are generally recommended, as busy patterns or logos can be distracting on camera.

questions.question: Can I bring props or pets?
questions.answer: Absolutely! Props and well-behaved pets are welcome. Just mention it in advance so the session can be planned accordingly.

questions.question: How long until I receive my photos?
questions.answer: A first look of photos is delivered within 24 hours of your session. Full edited galleries are typically ready within 1-2 weeks, though this may vary depending on complexity and scope.

questions.question: In what format will I receive my images?
questions.answer: You'll receive high-resolution digital files via a private online gallery. Both web-optimized and full-resolution downloads are included.

questions.question: Do you require a deposit?
questions.answer: Yes, a 50% deposit is required to secure your booking. The remaining balance is due on the day of the session.

questions.question: Do you offer payment plans?
questions.answer: For larger packages or commercial projects, payment arrangements can be discussed. Just ask during your consultation.

questions.question: What areas do you serve?
questions.answer: Pitfal Solutions is based in Denver, CO and primarily serves the Denver metro area. Travel fees may apply for locations outside a 25-mile radius.

questions.question: Do you offer both photography and videography?
questions.answer: Yes! Both services are available individually or as combined packages. This is perfect for brand content, events, or anyone who wants both photo and video coverage.
